name: hephaestus
description: HEPHaestus — a Claude Code plugin marketplace for high-energy physics phenomenology. Feynman diagrams, one-loop amplitudes, BSM model building, Monte Carlo, dark-matter constraints, Higgs bounds, plotting, and more.

plugins.name: hep-ph-toolkit
plugins.description: All-in-one toolkit for high-energy physics phenomenology — Feynman diagrams, one-loop amplitudes (FeynArts/FormCalc/LoopTools), BSM model building (FeynRules/SARAH/SPheno), dark-matter constraints (DDCalc/HiggsTools/GamLike/micrOMEGAs/DRAKE), Monte Carlo event generation (MadGraph/MadDM), publication plotting (matplotlib/mplhep/TikZ-Feynman), plus workflow skills for model-to-tool routing and analytic-exception detection. Collider analysis, RGE running, parton-shower configuration, ROOT analysis, statistical inference, LaTeX paper drafting, and arXiv/literature search are on the roadmap.
